---
title: "Preprints and Publications"
description-meta: "Information, pdfs, and social metrics of papers"
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
---
Alimohammadi, Y., Huang, K., Borgs, C., & Chayes, J. (2026). Auditing the auditors: Does community-based moderation get it right? *arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.18053*. [[link](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18053)]

Borgs, C., Huang, K., & Zhao, G. (2025). Travel bans vs. social distancing: A mathematical analysis. *arXiv preprint arXiv:2510.08895*. [[link](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.08895)]

Chatterjee, U., Huang, K., Karmakar, R., Kumar, B.R., Lugosi, G., Malhotra, N., et al. (2025). Detecting weighted hidden cliques. [[preprint](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.21543)]

Borgs, C., Huang, K., & Ikeokwu, C. (2024). A law of large numbers for SIR on the stochastic block model: A proof via herd immunity. *Submitted* [[preprint](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.07097)] 

Huang, K., Jiang, Z., & Imai, K. (2022). Designing and analyzing two-stage randomized experiments. *R package RCT2, version 0.0.1*. [[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=RCT2)]
